## Checklist

- [ ] This PR references an existing issue (`Fixes #...`)
- [ ] I have added tests that cover my changes
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and fixed all warnings
- [ ] I have run `npm run typecheck` with no errors
- [ ] I have reviewed my own code for style compliance (no `any`, no `let`, no `else`, ESM)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] Conventional commit message format used
- [ ] CI patterns followed (SHA-pinned actions, fail-fast, gatherer jobs)

## Type of Change

<!-- Mark the relevant option with an `x` -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `test` — adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance, dependencies, tooling
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes
